meta.title: HamdanMart — Online Shopping in Bangladesh
meta.description: Quality products, fair prices, fast delivery across Bangladesh. Cash on delivery, bKash, Nagad and Rocket supported.

home.title: Welcome to HamdanMart
home.subtitle: A modern online shop for Bangladesh — fast, secure, and easy to use.

search.title: Search
search.resultsFor: {count, plural, =0 {No results} one {# result} other {# results}} for “{query}”
search.empty: Type something to search for products.

cart.title: Shopping cart
cart.shippingNote: Shipping and discounts are calculated at checkout.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.orderPlacedHint: We have received your order and will contact you shortly to confirm.

orders.noOrders: You have not placed any orders yet.
orders.trackPhone: Mobile number used for the order
orders.cancelConfirmHint: This cannot be undone. Stock will be returned.

footer.tagline: Quality products, fair prices, fast delivery.
footer.payments: Payments: Cash on Delivery, bKash, Nagad, Rocket

auth.forgotHint: Enter your email and we will send you a reset link.
auth.name: Full name
auth.resetEmailSent: If an account exists for that email, a reset link has been sent. Please check your inbox.
auth.passwordResetDone: Your password has been reset. Log in with your new password.
auth.invalidResetLink: This reset link is invalid. Please request a new one.
auth.verifySuccessHint: Your email address has been confirmed. Happy shopping!
auth.verifyFailedHint: The link is invalid or has expired. Log in to request a new one.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters
validation.phoneBd: Enter a valid Bangladeshi mobile number (e.g. 017XXXXXXXX)

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.invalidInput: Please check the form and try again.
errors.accountLocked: Too many failed attempts. Try again in 15 minutes.
errors.emailTaken: An account with this email already exists.
errors.invalidToken: This link is invalid or has expired.
errors.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait a moment.
errors.outOfStock: This product is out of stock.
errors.productUnavailable: This product is no longer available.
errors.shippingInvalid: Please choose a valid delivery method.
errors.paymentUnavailable: That payment method is not available yet.
errors.couponInvalid: This coupon code is not valid.
errors.couponMinOrder: Your order does not meet the minimum for this coupon.
errors.couponUsedUp: This coupon has reached its usage limit.
errors.orderNotFound: Order not found. Check the order number and phone.
errors.orderNotCancellable: This order can no longer be cancelled.
